name: Scorching Ray
description: You hurl three fiery rays. SRD lets you hurl them at one target within range or at several; the engine resolves all rays at the initially-clicked target (per-ray re-targeting is a future enhancement). Make a ranged spell attack for each ray. On a hit, the target takes 2d6 Fire damage. Each ray's d20 and damage roll are independent.
scaling: You create one additional ray for each spell slot level above 2.
